title: xeriscape grilled filipino beef bistek
description: a briny, bouncy-qq, sick-day filipino dish featuring sugar snap peas, grill, shojin-friendly, form=bistek.

ingredients.name: beef (pork or beef, sliced into thin strips)
vinegar
ingredients.notes: apple cider vinegar or balsamic vinegar

instructions: in a small bowl, whisk together calamansi juice, vinegar, fish sauce, and sugar (if using).
toss beef strips with the marinade to coat. let sit for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
grill the beef strips for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
transfer the beef to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
add coconut oil to the grill grates and let melt.
add sugar snap peas to the grill grates and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender.
season the peas with salt and black pepper to taste.
to serve, place the beef strips on a plate with the grilled peas and garnish with chopped green onions (if using).
